ok i hate this picture
i suspect its based on ai, it makes no sense from a town planning perspective
why are there gravestones scattered randomly around on the common land
why is there a well directly next to the graveyard
why are all these multi-storey townhouses built in the middle of nowhere, and why is there a STONE TOWER in the center
Babe a fantasy town not making sense from a town planning perspective does not mean it's based on AI
Sometimes artists just like to draw shit because it looks cool and atmospheric
Logic and fantasy writers or writers in general are rarely in proximity
like genuinely what purpose does this tower serve
who approved this construction
most towers in real life are attached to things like castles and forts
Most fantasy societies are stupid considering they never factor in whatever fantasy element into how the society work
this doesnt look like a clock tower or a windmill or anything that would warrant a stone tower
its literally just a free standing turret
maybe this is the kind of idea you come up with when you drink corpse-flavored groundwater from the well
There's a lot of really good fantasy worldbuilding out there if you wade past the wishfulfillment slop and stuff made for kids
